name: f1-pitwall-xr
description: Immersive F1 pit wall — Lapz-inspired multi-stream viewer with 3D track for Mac and Quest 2

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,electron -c blue,green,yellow "pnpm --filter @pitwall/server dev" "pnpm --filter @pitwall/client dev" "wait-on -t 120000 https://localhost:5173 https://localhost:8787/health && pnpm electron:dev"
scripts.dev:web: pnpm setup:certs && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @pitwall/server dev" "pnpm --filter @pitwall/client dev"
